question: Q1
reason: The paper proposes changing return types in std::inplace_vector (e.g., try_push_back returning optional<T&> instead of T*, try_append_range returning borrowed_subrange_t<R> instead of borrowed_iterator_t<R>). This is a feature proposal, meeting the applicability rule. The cited code block appears verbatim in §3 and shows the proposed API (try_append_range returning a subrange) in use, satisfying the evidence rule for Q1.
